v15_final_hardfork_intent.rationale: After V15, no further consensus changes planned. Critical-security overrides excepted. If every V13 candidate ships cleanly at 12000, V15 may not be needed at all.

confirmed_items.label: All cASERT equalizer profiles E7-H35 active
confirmed_items.blocker_note: No V13-gated profile ceiling expansion found in include/sost/params.h (current ceiling tracked as CASERT_HARD_PROFILE_CEILING = 10 and CASERT_CEILING_H13_HEIGHT historical step). Add an effective_profile_ceiling_at(height) helper that returns 35 for height >= V13_HEIGHT before V13 cut, OR fallback this item to V15.

confirmed_items.label: DTD lottery cooldown 5 -> 6 blocks
confirmed_items.evidence: include/sost/params.h:835 lottery_exclusion_window_at(height) returns 6 for height >= V13_HEIGHT, else LOTTERY_RECENT_WINNER_EXCLUSION_WINDOW (= 5).

confirmed_items.label: Future-drift cap 60s -> 30s
confirmed_items.evidence: include/sost/params.h:852 max_future_drift_at(height) returns 30 for height >= V13_HEIGHT.
confirmed_items.operator_warning: NTP synchronisation strongly recommended for mining post-V13. Clock skew > 30 s ahead -> blocks rejected (not consensus-mandatory).

confirmed_items.label: Beacon Phase II-A — local notices, file-only, no P2P, no HTTP from node, signed
confirmed_items.evidence: include/sost/params.h:828 BEACON_PHASE2A_ACTIVATION_HEIGHT = V13_HEIGHT. include/sost/beacon.h declares the hardcoded BEACON_PUBKEY_HEX.

gated_items.label: PoPC Model A + B — full automated lifecycle

gates.rule: Audit daemon exists and is production-wired (a systemd unit / cron / native thread invoking compute_audit_seed + is_audit_triggered on a schedule).
Auto-slash on audit failure is wired and tested (popc_slash invoked automatically when an audit fails).
Auto-settlement of reward + bond release is wired and tested (popc_release invoked automatically on commitment maturity).
Model B Ethereum SOSTEscrow deployment checklist complete for intended network (deployment record file + verified address + production deploy log).
Ethereum event listener exists and is tested for GoldDeposited -> escrow_register on the SOST side.
Consensus-level POPC_ACTIVATION_HEIGHT (or equivalent named constant) exists in include/sost/ and is referenced by the lifecycle code.
Full automated lifecycle integration test exists: register -> mature -> audit -> slash-or-settle -> close, with NO manual RPC call from the test.

gated_items.fallback_rule: If ANY of a-g is missing at the V13 binary cut, popc_model_a_b activation height is set to v15_fallback_height. Do NOT half-enable.

gated_items.label: Beacon Phase II-B — extends II-A with expiration/threshold-sig/mirror/revocation/severity

gates.rule: Design closed and documented (docs/BEACON_PHASE_IIB_SPEC.md or equivalent).
Implementation present in src/beacon* and gated at a height constant.
Test surface green: expiration-by-height test, threshold-N-of-M test, mirror-fallback test, revocation test, severity test.

gated_items.fallback_rule: If any gate fails, slides to v15_fallback_height; does NOT block the rest of V13.

gated_items.label: Beacon Phase III — P2P gossip of verified notices (ACTIVE at V13_HEIGHT)

gates.rule: include/sost/beacon_p2p.h + src/beacon_p2p.cpp implement the P2P NOTICE message and the dedup ring.
BEACON_P2P_ACTIVATION_HEIGHT is set to V13_HEIGHT (not INT64_MAX) in include/sost/params.h.
Static tests assert: no consensus change on receipt, no node restart, no command execution, no block of any tx, anti-spam reject without peer-ban.
Tests prove per-peer rate limit (BEACON_P2P_PEER_RATE_PER_MIN) holds under stress + the dedup ring bound (BEACON_P2P_CACHE_MAX_NOTICES) holds.

gated_items.fallback_rule: If any gate fails, slides to v15_fallback_height. To roll back in the field, revert BEACON_P2P_ACTIVATION_HEIGHT to INT64_MAX (single-line constant change).

gated_items.label: Memory-Lock per-instance — per-thread ConvergenceX dataset (anti-pool)

gates.rule: Design doc exists separate from V11_SPEC.md (e.g. docs/MEMORY_LOCK_PER_INSTANCE_SPEC.md) with the activation height and threading model.
Independent simulation artifact in the repo (simulation script + result file) proving the per-thread split does not raise the declared 8 GB RAM floor.
Implementation present in src/ at a height-gated path.
Test proves a legitimate 8 GB single-CPU miner is not broken by the activation.

gated_items.fallback_rule: If any gate fails, slides to v15_fallback_height or stays inactive.

decision_at_12100.subject: DTD lottery: keep at 1-of-3 permanent OR disable
decision_at_12100.option_a: Keep — cooldown stays at 6 (V13), supplementary redistribution in parallel with PoPC.
decision_at_12100.option_b: Disable — return to clean 50/25/25 split on every block; PoPC + Useful Compute carry the extra-coinbase rewards alone.
